units.translation_target_text: In May 2023, First-Citizens Bank & Trust Company ("First Citizens") filed a lawsuit in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California against several HSBC subsidiaries and former employees of Silicon Valley Bank.

units.translation_target_text: Seven U.S.-based HSBC employees filed a lawsuit seeking US$1 billion in damages. The lawsuit alleges, among other things, that various HSBC companies conspired with individual defendants to solicit employees from First Citizens.
